title: Simple Client Mods
description: Simple client side mods for a better Vanilla experience
body:
**Welcome to Simple Client Mods**, a modpack designed for players who appreciate a streamlined and user-friendly experience! This modpack aims to enhance gameplay while keeping things straightforward and accessible for both newcomers and seasoned players alike.

## Features:

- User-Friendly Enhancements:                                                                           
Enjoy a variety of mods that improve the overall gameplay experience without overwhelming complexity. From quality-of-life improvements to aesthetic upgrades, this modpack has it all.

- Performance Optimizations:                                                                            
Experience smoother gameplay with mods that optimize your Minecraft performance, ensuring that you can play without lag while boosting FPS.

- Customizable Options:                                                                                    
Tailor your game to fit your style with mods that offer customizable settings, allowing you to adjust graphics, controls, and more to your liking.

- Community Feedback:                               
As this is my first modpack, I am eager to hear from you! Please share any suggestions for future updates. Your feedback is invaluable and will help me improve the modpack for everyone 


---------------------

## Modlist:
> **(23 mods total)**
> 
> 
> ### APIs:
> 1. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 
> 2. [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)
> 
> ### Performance Mods:
> 1. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
> 2. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
> 3. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
> 4. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
> 5. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
> 6. [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
> 7. [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
> 
> ### Quality-Of-Life:
> 1.  [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) :
Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
> 2.  [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) :
Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
> 3.  [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) :
A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
> 4.  [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) :
Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.
> 5.  [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) :
replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable one.
> 6.  [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) :
A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures.
> 7.  [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) :
A working voice chat in Minecraft!
> 8.  [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) :
View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory.
> 9.  [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) :
Enhanced Minecraft features in one simple mod (play Minecraft multiplayer)
> 10. [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) :
Fabric mod to connect to EVERY Minecraft server version.
> 11. [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) :
A client-side schematic mod with extra features for creative mode work.
> 12. [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) :
Adds dynamic lights to Minecraft.
> 13. [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) :
The Light Overlay Mod with a twist!
> 14. [Inventory HUD+](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge/files?gameVersionTypeId=4) : Shows useful information that helps in combat   (only on CurseForge)





<details>
